reason: Defines the scalar fallback plugin boundary and now covers scalar source/header/object artifact helpers.
Defines generic target artifact routing and plugin-owned emission/runtime boundaries.
Defines structured rv64 and RISC-V toolchain capability identities consumed by scalar object export.
Defines capability objects and toolchain facts used to constrain artifact emission diagnostics.
Defines focused lit/C++ coverage expectations for target artifact export routes and bundles.
